{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301492420D53C37FBF29D04E901"}"},"total":479},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7262900879517844259","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，可以把每个女主的感情线清晰写一下，不需要那种随随便便直接白给的，个人喜欢多女主，希望每个女主都有自己的特色[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691025958,"group_id":"7251819683597257763","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8WVCtD3SyG8P6Y2xRS/kRQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/abe3311d02ea479ab03f905dcd3b852a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792469&x-signature=niVBUWAZAM1jWo1JTTqYe57frcQ%3D","user_id":"108012398477","user_name":"怨悔怨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108012398477","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1646839346,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7251819683597257763","book_info":{"abstract":"蒸汽朋克+克苏鲁！
“先生，请问您对最近的根廷晨报怎么看？”
“他们说我是深渊代行者、王国谋逆者、魔女的挚友、世界的背叛者、人渣、玩弄少女内心之人、卑鄙的外乡人、不详的亵渎者、万恶的辐射源、哄骗萝莉的变态、最为疯狂的邪神、不可名状中的不可名状！
污蔑，通通都是污蔑！
我，伊凡，是个好人！
不开玩笑！”
附：魔女的滋味针不戳……
-------------------------------------
一觉醒来，伊凡来到未知的诡秘世界，
深渊之下，不可名状的旧神在窥视，
岁月之中，五部纪元的史诗被神秘掩埋，
正神的传说在人间流传，神迹不再是幻想，
神秘的非凡者铸造灵性石板，获得名为符文的奇迹，
第六纪2567年的7月1号，一位获得造物主权柄的少年睁开双眼，一部波澜壮阔的史诗就此展开！
本书又名：卑鄙的外乡人的奇妙之旅、诡秘世界，我可以豁免代价、这个外乡人，太优雅了、这不行，得加钱！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o21fec5b4ec3462aeb5d844c3c8e9d715~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"泠泠月影","author_id":"","book_id":"7251819683597257763","book_name":"我一个非凡，随时成神怎么了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a09890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7251819779551003140","read_count":"31288","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1013143"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"389","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,架空,开局,异世大陆","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/8fb748d00cc044f1c21545fa02f58b77~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385764&x-signature=vj2iX7P2%2BTOKn6zvxHnM%2BJCHTak%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3162621995915032","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.639924e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301492420D53C37FBF29D04E901"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suff
